---
name: Feature / enhancement request
about: Suggest an additional analysis, visualisation, or documentation improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: souravmb
---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what you are proposing and why it adds value. -->
<!-- Example: "Add a Kruskal-Wallis test as a nonparametric alternative to the one-way ANOVA in Unit IV." -->



---

## Type of enhancement

- [ ] Additional statistical test or procedure
- [ ] New visualisation or diagnostic plot
- [ ] Extended post-hoc or effect-size analysis
- [ ] Documentation / methodology note
- [ ] Reproducibility improvement (session info, renv lockfile, Docker)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this useful? Who benefits and in what context? -->
<!-- Be specific: "This helps instructors who want to demonstrate the parametric/nonparametric parallel for Unit III." -->



---

## Proposed approach

<!-- Sketch the implementation. For a new test, include the R function(s) you have in mind. -->

```r
# Example R code illustrating the approach (optional but helpful)
```

---

## Syllabus alignment

<!-- Does this fall within the 24ASD516 syllabus, or is it an extension? -->
<!-- If an extension: why does it belong in this repository? -->

- [ ] Directly maps to a syllabus topic
- [ ] Extension beyond the syllabus (justify below)



---

## Datasets affected

- [ ] `statecrime_DOJ.csv`
- [ ] `elnino_NOAA.csv`
- [ ] Constructed data (Latin Square)
- [ ] New dataset proposed — **note: new datasets are generally out of scope; see CONTRIBUTING.md**

---

## Would you like to implement this yourself?

- [ ] Yes — I will open a pull request
- [ ] No — I am raising this for the maintainer to consider

---

## Additional context

<!-- Any references, papers, or textbook sections that support this addition. -->
